parsed_review.summary: CP00-201 (RP06 "DMS Core" service-contract pack, risk_class C, 150 units RP06.P01.M06.S05-RP06.P02.M02.S22) passes read-only independent review with one P2 finding. (a) No production_ready overclaim: manifest.json, command-evidence.json, construction-inspection.json, adjudication.md and claude-review-result.json all correctly report production_ready=false / status in_progress / pending — the pack-level claim gate (dms_core_service_contract_golden_case_descriptor_verified) is encoded in source, the contract snapshot, the validators, and the node:test suite, all internally consistent and descriptor-only (no writes, no real client/matter/document/billing/settlement/credential data, no runtime API execution). (b) CP178+ review hardening holds: the prior failed attempt (API ConnectionRefused, is_error:true, num_turns 28) was correctly normalized to invalid_review / closeout_eligible:false / parsed_review:null with invalid_reason 'auth_or_cli_error; structured_output_missing; required_field_error: parsed_review missing', so an auth/CLI failure is not accepted as valid evidence; the forbidden_review_evidence list (auth_failure, stdout_0_bytes, malformed_json, fenced_json_plus_prose, tool_call_shaped_output, claude_final_approval_claim, source_mutation_claim, production_or_enterprise_trust_claim) is encoded in both registry.js and manifest.json. (c) Authority boundary preserved: claude_not_final_approver:true, required_mode read_only, allowed_tools Read/Grep/Glob, human_final_approval_required_for_enterprise_trust_claim. (d) Hermes (H06) is used only as a deterministic control-plane gate for review packet/receipt handling — hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product:false, no_runtime_api_handler_execution:true — not for product runtime. Unrelated dirty/untracked files (UI/amplitude scripts, .DS_Store, etc.) were treated as out-of-scope per changed-file-scope.json. The single P2 is that local-validation execution receipts are not yet captured (command-evidence.json commands:[]), which a read-only reviewer cannot run; it is a downstream closeout prerequisite, not a source defect, and does not block this review. No P0 or P1 issues; nothing from this review blocks pack or goal closeout, and final human approval remains required for any enterprise-trust claim.

findings.title: Local validation execution evidence not yet captured (command-evidence.json commands array empty)
findings.details: command-evidence.json is status 'in_progress' with commands:[] and the H06 Hermes gate gate_outcome 'pending'. The 11 baseline validation_commands plus validate-rp06-dms-core-contract.mjs and the node:test suite have no recorded passing-run receipts. As a read-only reviewer (Read/Grep/Glob only, no Bash) I verified local-validation support at the descriptor/source/contract/test-encoding level — registry.js, model.js, service.js, validators.js, contracts/dms-core-contract.json (service_contract_descriptor DmsCoreCp201ServiceGoldenCaseDescriptor) and packages/dms/test/model.test.js are internally consistent — but could not confirm captured execution output. The pack correctly marks production_ready:false and status:in_progress, so this is an expected pre-review pipeline state, not an overclaim or a source defect.
findings.recommendation: Before flipping the production_ready_flag (dms_core_service_contract_golden_case_descriptor_verified) and closing the pack, populate command-evidence.json with passing runs of validate-rp06-dms-core-contract.mjs, `node --test`, and the 11 baseline validation_commands, and let the H06 Hermes gate resolve to a non-pending outcome. No source changes required.
